verdict.answer_first: B opens with the direct mechanism: "free memory automatically by tracking reachability"; A also answers early but starts more generally with "automatic memory management."
verdict.decisiveness: B gives one clean explanation path and stays focused; A sprawls into many internals and ends with "Want me to go deeper," which feels more like a survey.
verdict.fabrication: Both make unsupported concrete claims, especially "sub-millisecond" pause targets; A has more unsupported specificity such as "Cheney-style semi-space" and "Orinoco" without evidence.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to use because it explains the working model, leak implication, and trade-off plainly; A has useful takeaways but is heavier and more jargon-dense.
